content.en:
The ancient secret spring under 100,000 kilometers, the energy here distorts time and space, and layers of space-time barriers are densely packed here, forming a circle of space-time layers.

If other fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords stood here, their bodies would directly turn into powder.

Even Ye Tian was under tremendous pressure at this time, and he could barely hold on.

At this time, Ye Tian had not yet cultivated seriously, and the abundant energy poured into his body, refining his~'s supreme legendary body.

Ye Tian's Supreme Legendary Body had already reached the Dacheng realm, and with his cultivation promoted to the fifth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord realm, the Supreme Legendary Body could be regarded as stepping into the Dacheng Peak Realm, and it was one step away from consummation.

However, even this step was extremely difficult, if there was no Ancient Secret Spring, Ye Tian didn't know how long it would take to hope for it to be raised to the Consummation Realm.

"Let's start absorbing!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he sat cross-legged and began to absorb the energy in the Refining Ancient Secret Spring.

Suddenly, he used the secret of swallowing.

Although the secret of swallowing is aimed at the blood of the life of the boundary river to strengthen one's own life level, it can also be used to devour energy, which is one of the incidental effects.

Rumble!!!!!

A large amount of Ancient Secret Spring energy was devoured by Ye Tian's Swallowing Secret, refining Ye Tian's supreme legendary body at an even more terrifying speed.

"I didn't expect to use the secret of swallowing to refine the energy of the ancient secret spring, the effect is so good, the secret of swallowing is worth my continued potential!"

Ye Tian gathered his thoughts and continued to cultivate.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's supreme legendary body continued to improve, causing Ye Tian's physical strength to also increase, and his strength was steadily increasing.

I don't know how long it has been, but on this day, Ye Tian's Supreme Legendary Body has finally completed a breakthrough.

Rumble!!!!

The Supreme Legendary Body was elevated from Dacheng to the realm of perfection, and a consummation coercion permeated out.

Then, Ye Tian's body began to transform and improve, this is a qualitative improvement, and the help for strength is naturally extremely huge.

And with the supply of the ancient secret spring's energy, this transformation was quickly completed.

After the Supreme Legendary Body was promoted to the Consummation Realm, Ye Tian only needed to completely control more than thirty percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, which was equivalent to a half-step Eternal Controller Realm.

At the moment, Ye Tian is not yet a half-step Eternal Master.

However, even if the Supreme Legendary Body reached the consummation realm, he could still cultivate in the Ancient Secret Spring and refine his body, and his body could still be improved until he could not improve it.

Other than that.

Although the power of Ye Tian's whole body has been transformed into space-time control power, this power can still continue to improve.

For example, his physical strength has increased so much, and he can continue to absorb energy and transform it into space-time control power, which is equivalent to improving his cultivation.

Strictly speaking, he was still some way from the extreme of the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, and he could continue to improve his strength.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to practice in the depths of the Ancient Secret Spring, improving his cultivation and refining his body.

But later, the effect of the Ancient Secret Spring became worse and worse.

And not long after, Lord Bina and the other three peak Legendary Realm lords left, leaving only Ye Tian alone.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had been here for a full year.

"It's time!"

Airplanes!

The power of the Half-Tooth Secret Domain swept in, and instantly moved Ye Tian out of the Half-Tooth Secret Domain.

Outside the entrance of the Half Tooth Secret Domain, Ye Tian's body appeared here.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

His copy body quickly returned to the Qinglian Giant City, and called the Ancient Secret Leaf to the copy body residing in the Qinglian Giant City, and then left the Qinglian Giant City and continued to explore the Boundary River.

After all, copying the body often goes to various Jedi, and if it falls, the Ancient Secret Leaf will be wasted.

Therefore, he will not use the Ancient Secret Leaf easily, and even if he does, he will give it to his relatives or take it out for trading, and it is unnecessary to use it himself.

After that, Ye Tian's body and the replica body left in the Qinglian Giant City tried to control his Supreme Legendary Body, which was the kind that completely controlled the power.

But it was his turn to really try to take control, and it was very difficult to find it.

His body is too powerful, resulting in the Supreme Legendary Body being extremely powerful, so it will be more difficult to completely control the Supreme Legendary Body.

What does total control mean?

Strictly speaking, the Supreme Legendary Body is also the embodiment of the rules, a kind of physique that is finally born from the combination of countless origin forces, and if you want to completely control the Supreme Legendary Body, you must completely control countless origin forces and control the root of all this, and the difficulty can be imagined.

In the Boundary River, a fifth-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord, even if he is very talented and has the help of an Eternal Master, if he wants to break through from a Peak Legendary Realm Lord to a half-step Eternal Master, his time is also measured in billions of Realm River years, and his time is long enough to make countless Peak Legendary Realm Lords despair.

Ask for flowers

Therefore, to be able to become a half-step eternal controller in the boundary river, it will either take countless years to survive, or there will be an amazing opportunity.

In short, in a short period of time, it would be difficult for Ye Tian to become a half-step eternal master.

Of course, Ye Tian is not in a hurry, he can still improve his space-time control power at present, and he can also use the secret of swallowing to absorb the essence blood of the life of the refining realm river and strengthen his life level, although the increase in strength is slow, at least it is still improving.

And unlike many fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords, who have cultivated for I don't know how many thousands of Realm River Years, their strength has not improved at all, so they are helpless!

...........

Comparatively speaking, Ye Tian's progress was enough to make countless peak Legendary Realm Lords envious.

Time flies, time passes.

Void Zone.

Ye Tian's body has been cultivating in the Infinite Heaven and Earth, although there is no use for him here, but other places are of no use to him, so he doesn't care about any treasures.

Just like the white-bearded old man, he didn't care about the treasure land for a long time, and he didn't fight for any treasure land.

But in fact, with the strength of the white-bearded old man, what treasure land do you want?

In the Void Region, in addition to cultivating, Ye Tian spent the rest of his time developing the True Void Holy Land and the Human Race, and at present, the development of the Human Race is very good, and many half-step Legendary Realm Lords have been born.

And Ye Tian's wife and children have also been promoted to the realm of Legendary Realm Lords, which naturally has Ye Tian's help.

He even brought some precious resources and treasures from the Boundary River and used them on their bodies, plus they were given some talents, and it was difficult for them to break through.

this day.

The Origin Sea of the Terran Ancestral Land has evolved again, and the Origin Sea has grown into an Eternal Sea comparable to the Infinite Sea, but because Ye Tian was born in the Infinite Sea, the Terran has grown so strongly, causing the Infinite Sea to break its own limit, comparable to those top Eternal Seas in the Void Region.

In a certain sense, the source sea has surpassed the immeasurable sea.

There's no way, who made him too strong to feed back to the source sea!

And with the evolution of the source sea, not long after, the source sea was born a top treasure land.

And the birth of this top-level treasure land has attracted the attention of many peak Legendary Realm lords. _
